blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A). Inspect continuity between No. 1 and No. 2 terminals of the coupler (B) and check the following items If abnormal, the parking pin switch is defective, Replace parking pin switch. Connect the coupler.

items.text: No continuity when the select lever is in the P position and the select lever push button is released.
No continuity when the select lever is in the P position and the select lever push button is released.
There is continuity when the select lever is in the P position and the push button on the select lever is pressed.
There is continuity when the select lever is in the P position and the push button on the select lever is pressed.
There is continuity when the select lever is moved from the P position to any other position.
There is continuity when the select lever is moved from the P position to any other position.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
